capture_gated_on: M36T safe stop (dual-3090 priority per steer)
difficulty_bands: BANDS table frozen in the generator module at the blob above
verifier: shared deterministic numeric checker (m36_calibration.task_verdict on exact integer known_answer), unit-tested with independent recomputation (40/40 at be20e47)

decode_protocol.cap_escalation_rule: move an entire band to 4096 only if truncation > 0.10 and a bounded pilot shows the larger cap materially reduces it; never mix caps inside a primary band estimate
decode_protocol.checkpoint: same pinned Agents-A1 AWQ checkpoint and revision as M36C/M36T
decode_protocol.runtime: isolated vLLM 0.24.0 telemetry runtime, override hash recorded at capture

selection_rule: band eligibility from aggregate development performance only; no individual-task selection; no expansion beyond the frozen sweep
stop_condition: if overall gates unmet after the bounded sweep, commit m38e_completed_error_frontier_not_found and stop
labels_are_not_features: correct answer and verifier result are labels only and may not enter any prediction feature
privacy_check_status: aggregate manifest only; tasks and rows private
